template.name: capsenum
template.value: finishMe("finishMe"); private String cd; $type_name$ (String s) { this.cd = s; } public String toString() { return stringValue(); } public String stringValue() { return cd; } public boolean equals(String value) { return cd.equalsIgnoreCase(value); } public static $type_name$ parse(String e) { $type_name$[] arr = values(); for (int i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) { if( arr[i].equals(e) ) return arr[i]; } return null; }
